name: Ground Beef Stroganoff
directions: Combine meat, flour, salt, pepper and paprika.
In a large skillet, cook onion in butter until golden.
Add meat and brown while stirring.
Add cream of chicken soup and mushrooms (if desired) and cook 5 minutes.
Add sour cream and heat thoroughly.
Serve on Chow Mein Noodles, egg noodles or rice.

name: Simple Hamburger Stroganoff
directions: Brown and drain hamburger.
Cook noodles according to package directions.
In skillet combine beef, noodles, soup, garlic, sour cream, salt, and pepper. Heat through & serve.

name: Mom's Easy Hamburger Stroganoff
directions: Saute first 4 ingredients until until beef is browned, drain the fat off as much as possible.
Add garlic, beef broth, worstershire sauce, and some more pepper.
and ketchup, simmer for 20 - 30 minutes.
Stir flour into sour cream until well mixed, add to meat mixture, cook over medium heat until thickened.

name: Easy Almost Ground Beef Stroganoff
directions: In a skillet, brown ground beef, drain.
In 4qt pot, begin boiling water for noodles.
Add onion, minced garlic, beef bullion, and mushrooms to skillet.  Cook until onion is tender.
When water is boiling, add noodles, cook as package directs.
Once meat mixture is ready, add can of soup, water, milk, and sour cream. Simmer over low heat until noodles are done.
Combine noodles and creamy meat mixture in 4qt pot.
Serve and Enjoy!

name: Beef Stroganoff
directions: In large sauce pan, brown ground beef and drain, set aside.
Saute onion and garlic in butter until transparent, return ground beef to pan.
Add flour, salt, pepper and mushrooms, cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in soup and sour cream and cook over low heat for 15 minutes.
Serve over egg noodles.

name: Quick and Easy Hamburger Stroganoff
directions: Brown onions and flour in butter until golden brown.
Add pepper, paprika, ground beef and mushroom soup.
Cook for 5 minutes or until heated through.
Add sour cream and heat through.
Serve over rice or pasta.

name: Stroganoff (Without Sour Cream!)
directions: Brown ground beef in skillet, then add in mushrooms and onion and cook until tender.  stir in the remaining ingrediants (your choice if you want to use the sour cream) except noodles.  Use cornstarch mixed with water to thiken as needed.  Serve over egg noodles. Enjoy!

name: Ground Beef Stroganoff
directions: In medium skillet, brown ground beef and onion; drain excess fat.
Stir in garlic salt, pepper, soup and mushrooms.
Simmer covered, 15 to 20 minutes.
Stir in sour cream; heat through, but do not boil.
Serve over rice, noodles or chow mein noodles.

name: Beef Stroganoff
directions: Saute onion in butter over medium heat, in a 10 inch frying pan or 2 quart sauce pan, for about 5 minutes.
Add steak and continue to saute until meat is browned.
Stir in mushrooms, tomato soup and Worcestershire sauce.
Reduce heat to low and simmer until well heated about 5 minutes stirring every few minutes.
Just before serving add sour cream and stir until well blended.
Serve over steamed white rice or egg noodles.

name: Easiest Beef Stroganoff Ever
directions: Coat meat lightly with flour.
Heat olive oil in large skillet, and lightly brown meat on all sides.
Add condensed soup (do NOT add water), drained mushrooms, and stir to coat.
Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 45 minutes until meat is tender.
Immediately before serving, stir in sour cream until blended and creamy.
Serve over egg noodles.

name: Beef Stroganoff
directions: Brown beef in a skillet and drain fat.
Add onion soup mix, ketchup, dry mustard, and cream of mushroom soup.
Cook over medium until warmed through.
Add mushrooms and sour cream.
Stir to mix thoroughly.
Serve over hot noodles.

name: Beef Stroganoff
directions: Start boiling water for Egg Noodles, put in to cook as soon as the water is ready.

In Large Skillet, heat Olive Oil; Saute Onions and Mushrooms til limp. Add ground beef and cook through. Season meat with salt, pepper, and garlic powder. (it should be pretty salty.) Add mushroom soup and heat til combined and bubbly. Add frozen peas. When it starts to simmer again, turn off heat and add sour cream. Stir to combine. Taste for seasoning and correct if needed.
Serve over egg noodles.

name: Beef Stroganoff
directions: Heat oil in pan. Add beef, and stir until browned.
Add onion, and stir through. Cook until onions are softened.
Add mushrooms, and stir through. Cook until mushrooms are cooked through.
Add cream, stir through, and serve over rice.

name: Beef Stroganoff
directions: Brown steak tips and onion in skillet.
Add mushrooms, milk, garlic, and beef bouillon; bring to boil.
Mix together the wine and sour cream, add to skillet, and heat through.
Season with salt and pepper.
Serve over wide egg noodles.

name: Onion Beef Stroganoff
directions: In a large skillet over medium heat, cook beef in oil until no longer pink.
Stir in soup mix, potato soup, milk and mushrooms.
Cover and simmer for 35-40 minutes until meat is tender.
Serve over rice or noodles.

name: Healthier $#%& Beef Stroganoff
directions: Lightly sauté onion and garlic in olive oil.
Stir in ground beef and brown.
Stir in flour, salt, mushrooms and pepper.  Cook for 5 minutes before stirring in soup.  Simmer uncovered for 10 minutes.
Stir in sour cream and simmer for another 5 minutes.  Serve over noodles.

name: Speedy Hamburger Stroganoff
directions: In a skillet over medium heat, brown beef and onion; drain.  Add paprika, salt and pepper, stirring in thoroughly.  Reduce heat to medium-low; blend in soup and tomato paste (if using) and heat through.  Stir in sour cream.  Serve over cooked noodles.

name: Amazing Ground Beef Stroganoff
directions: Saute meat in a medium skillet until it loses redness. Drain as necessary. Add Better Than Boullion or 1 cube of crushed beef boullion,  onion, & celery. Cook until vegetables are limp. Add remaining ingredients and simmer until all ingredients are heated and blended.
Just before serving,  stir in the sour cream and bring back to temperature.
Serve over rice or noodles.
